name: Bali Ubud Tour
description:
Immerse yourself in the breathtaking beauty of Tegallalang, where terraced landscapes form a living masterpiece. Feel the sacred atmosphere of Gunung Kawi Sebatu, enjoy the rich flavors of a local coffee plantation, and refresh your senses at Ulu Petanu Waterfall—all within a 6-hour guided experience.

All Bali Ubud tour prices are fully inclusive, covering private transportation, an experienced local guide, all entrance tickets, the purification ceremony, as well as coffee and herbal tea tasting—allowing you to relax and fully enjoy the journey with complete peace of mind.

Please note: according to Balinese custom, women who are on their menstrual period are not permitted to enter temples or participate in any ceremony.

name: The Folders – Space & Cafe
description:
Special Features of our Workspace & Cafe
 – Private & Curated Environment
 Unlike many open coworking hubs, The Folders emphasizes privacy and exclusivity. It’s designed to feel more like a boutique creative studio than a crowded office.
 – Community-Centered Approach
 They actively host workshops, cultural events, and collaborations — positioning themselves not just as a workspace, but as a hub for creative professionals and entrepreneurs in Hanoi.
 – Modern Aesthetic
 The space is styled with minimalist interiors and thoughtful design elements that encourage focus and inspiration. This makes it appealing to freelancers, startups, and digital nomads who value atmosphere as much as functionality.
 – Flexible Work Culture
 The Folders promotes a new way of working — balancing productivity with lifestyle. It’s not just about desks and Wi-Fi, but about creating an environment where people feel energized and connected.
 – Prime Location in Hanoi
 Situated in the heart of the city, it offers easy access to Hanoi’s cultural and business districts, making it convenient for both locals and international visitors.

 Yeghevnut, the green hotel is located in the mountains of Goris only 5 minute drive from the center.
 The hotel features rooms with amazing views overlooking the beautiful mountains of Goris. All the rooms at Yeghevnut are decorated in traditional warm tones offering a small seating area with a satellite TV, a desk and a private toilet with bathroom.
 The hotel’s main restaurant located on the ground floor serves breakfast buffet every morning starting 9:00 AM and à-la-carte specialties during the day. Guests can sip a cup of coffee or Armenian wine and chill at the bar located on the 1st floor while enjoying the relaxing ambiance.
 At Yeghevnut Green Hotel, the staff speaks Russian, English, French and Armenian.

Paradise Beach Resort is located on the shores of the tranquil Maenam beach and is just about 1640 feet from the center of the village. Shuttle service to / from Fisherman’s Villa and Chaweng’s city center is provided at a charge.

Each accommodation comes with a private balcony or veranda. There is air conditioning and a private bathroom with shower facilities.

name: DAMAC Maison Cour Jardin/ One Bedroom Suite
description:
Located in the heart of Business Bay, DAMAC Maison Cour Jardin offers luxurious apartments with an Arabesque décor and panoramic views of Downtown Dubai. Only a 5-minute drive from the Business Bay metro station , it is within walking distance to Bay Avenue with its many shops and restaurants. The Cour Jardin offers high-speed complimentary WiFi in all areas, an outdoor infinity pool and a state-of-the-art fitness center.

All accommodations are bright and spacious and feature a living area with a satellite flat-screen TV, a work desk and a fully equipped kitchenette/ kitchen with a washing machine and a dishwasher. The private bathroom is fitted with double sinks, a shower, soaking bathtub and complimentary Elemis toiletries.

Guests can enjoy the vertical garden, a sauna, a steam room and herbal aroma hot tub, while the younger guests have several entertainment options including Heads Up!, the indoor kids club (at an added charge), a playground  and kids’ pool. The Dreamworks Spa offers treatments in calm and serene surroundings.

Featuring a contemporary and colorful décor, the Maison Café offers spectacular views of the canal where guests can enjoy a variety of international dishes and refreshments.

Dubai International Financial Center is 10 minutes away by car, while Dubai Mall and the Dubai Fountains are 5 minute drive from the property. The nearest airport is Dubai International Airport, 7.5 mi from DAMAC Maison Cour Jardin. An airport shuttle is provided upon request. Free valet parking is available on site.

name: Act One Act Two/ 3Bedroom
description:
Act One | Act Two brings a new vision of luxury to The Opera District renowned for its culture and cosmopolitanism. The two-tower complex is comprised of one, two and three-bedroom premium apartments inspired by the iconic Dubai Fountain. The dynamic façades of these towering masterpieces mark the gateway to the world’s most notable skyscraper, Burj Khalifa – and a door to everything the iconic Downtown Dubai has to offer.

Nestled in the heart of Downtown Dubai’s Opera District, Act 1 | Act 2 offers fantastic views of The Dubai Fountain and Burj Khalifa. With access to the Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, this prime residential address is only a short walk from major attractions such as The Dubai Mall, The Dubai Fountain and Souk Al Bahar, to name a few. With its proximity to the Dubai Metro, the whole city is within reach.

Act One | Act Two boasts a fully-equipped gymnasium and health club to complement your active lifestyle. The temperature-controlled swimming pools offer respite from the heat and an opportunity to supplement your workout routine. It’s the perfect place to simply lounge and soak up the breathtaking views over the iconic horizon.

name: Bahwan Tower / 3Bedroom + MR
description:
Bahwan Tower Downtown Dubai is close to popular leisure destinations and commercial districts. Burj Khalifa, Dubai Fountain, The Dubai Mall, Dubai Opera and DIFC, Dubai are well within reach.

Bahwan Tower Downtown Dubai is the first freehold property by the developer. It features contemporary architecture topped with Italian porcelain tiles on walls and floors and European sanitary fittings. Each apartment has a German close-concept kitchen with dedicated space for laundry.

name: Vera Tower / 2 Bedroom Apartment
description:
Just a 18-minute walk from The Dubai Fountain and 1.1 miles from Dubai Mall, Vera Residences Business Bay features accommodations in Dubai with an indoor pool. This property offers access to a balcony, free private parking, and free Wifi. Dubai World Trade Centre is 5.2 miles away and Grand Mosque is 8.4 miles from the apartment.

Offering direct access to a terrace, this air-conditioned apartment comes with 2 separate bedrooms and a fully equipped kitchen. A flat-screen TV is available. The accommodation is non-smoking.

The apartment also features a pool with a view and a sauna for guests to relax in.

Burj Khalifa is 2.1 miles from Vera Residences Business Bay, while City Walk Mall is 3.3 miles from the property. The nearest airport is Dubai International Airport, 9.3 miles from the accommodation.

sleeping, bathing and living

key-less entry
 No Keys required at AMSTEL HouseBoat. Use your Phone and a digital key to open the door. Simple as that. We will send you an email with an App prior to your arrival. Just make sure Bluetooth is on and enter with the push of a button.

free bicycles
 There are free bikes provided at NEW LAKE HouseBoat. This way you’ll ride through town in a flash. Amsterdam is quite small; you’ll get to Dam Square in a 15 minute ride.

This shared house features a communal kitchen, shared bathrooms and toilets, and free internet, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a convenient and budget-friendly accommodation. Located in a welcoming neighborhood, our homestay offers a friendly, community atmosphere where residents can enjoy both privacy and connection. Whether you’re here for work or study, you’ll find a home-like environment that meets your needs.

The bed and breakfast also features free Wifi, free private parking, and facilities for disabled guests.

description: A comfortable living room with beautiful garden views!

name: Deluxe Room Twin Bed
description: The hot tub is the standout feature of this double room. Featuring free toiletries and bathrobes, this double room includes a private bathroom with a walk-in shower, a bath and a hairdryer. The spacious air-conditioned double room features a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a minibar, a seating area, a wardrobe as well as city views. The unit has 1 bed.

name: Deluxe Room King Bed
description: The hot tub is the standout feature of this double room. Featuring free toiletries and bathrobes, this double room includes a private bathroom with a walk-in shower, a bath and a hairdryer. The spacious air-conditioned double room features a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a minibar, a seating area, a wardrobe as well as city views. The unit has 1 bed.

name: Executive Twin Room
description:
Enjoying a central location in Doha, Decorated with soft carpets and large beds, rooms at Grand Regency Hotel-Doha are equipped with satellite TV channels and tea/coffee makers. Private bathrooms come with courtesy bathrobes and slippers.

Guests can enjoy world-class cuisine in one of the hotel’s establishments, International breakfast, lunch or dinner at Grand Gourmet. The on-site Al Kut Lounge serves European-inspired pastries and coffee brews. No alcoholic drinks are available.

Staff at the 24-hour reception can help plan visits and excursions to the iconic Museum of Islamic Arts or Al Koot Fort, both within a 10-minute drive from the Grand Regency Hotel. Free private parking is available on site.

name: Seruni Villas /  Villa with Private Pool
description: Located in Ubud, 2 miles from Ubud Palace, Cahaya Indah Villas has accommodations with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a garden and a terrace. This 5-star hotel offers room service, a concierge service and free WiFi. Each room is equipped with a patio with views of the pool.

name: Sakura Villas / Villa with Private Pool
description: Located in Ubud, 2 miles from Ubud Palace, Cahaya Indah Villas has accommodations with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a garden and a terrace. This 5-star hotel offers room service, a concierge service and free WiFi. Each room is equipped with a patio with views of the pool.

name: Widuri Villas / Villa with Private Pool
description: Situated in Ubud, 3.3 km from Ubud Palace, Cahaya Indah Villas features accommodation with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a garden and a terrace. With free WiFi, this 5-star hotel offers room service and a concierge service. Each room is equipped with a balcony with mountain views.

name: Alamanda Villas / Villa with Private Pool
description: Situated in Ubud, 3.3 km from Ubud Palace, Cahaya Indah Villas features accommodation with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a garden and a terrace. With free WiFi, this 5-star hotel offers room service and a concierge service. Each room is equipped with a balcony with mountain views.

name: Silverland SAKYO /  Deluxe Twin Room
description:
Placed in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City, Silverland Sakyo Hotel features a blend of Saigon’s soul and the serenity of Japanese culture. The hotel boasts a rooftop pool, 2 on-site restaurants and bars. You can enjoy rejuvenating treatments at KL Spa or simply relax in the lounge area. Complimentary internet access is also avaialble.

This well-appointed hotel is within 600 metres from both Ho Chi Minh City Hall and General Post Office. Tan Son Nhat International Airport is only 7 km away. Airport shuttle services can be arranged for a small fee.

Rooms are luxuriously furnished and fully air-conditioned. A minibar, a flat-screen TV and tea/coffee making facilities are included. The attached bathrooms come with a hairdryer and plush bathrobes. Some rooms offer a stand-alone bathtub.

Enjoy a cup of tea while you relax at the terrace or indulge in a traditional massage. Sauna, steam bath facilities, 24-hour reception are all available.

Our Restaurant offers a buffet spread of various Asian and international cuisines. Afternoon tea is also served at our restaurant for all the guests who stay at our hotel from 14:00-16:00, Traditional music band will be organized on each Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.4 for a two-person trip.

name: The Great Ponsonby Arthotel/Courtyard Studio
description:
Come and stay at The Great Ponsonby Arthotel, a delightful small hotel providing bed and breakfast in central Auckland. Just a two minute stroll to Ponsonby’s vibrant cafés, restaurants, galleries, shops and nightlife or a short taxi ride to the harbour and city centre.

The Great Ponsonby Arthotel, established over 20 years ago, is a renovated villa located in a heritage neighbourhood.

Beautifully decorated with original New Zealand and Pacific Island artworks, filled with books, magazines, music and persian rugs, you will feel at home and relaxed in our welcoming environment.

This roomy outdoor studio features a fully appointed kitchenette, dining table and a comfy leather couch for 2 people.

name: Javana Royal Villas / One-Bedroom Pool Villa
description:
Star rating : 5.0
 Perched at the fabulous outskirts of Seminyak, Javana Royal Villas features upscale honeymoon villas offering ultimate romantic comfort in a peaceful and tranquil atmosphere.
 Get One Time Floating Lunch for 2 pax for any booking made.

name: Uno Express/ Deluxe Room
description:
Ideally located in busy Sukhumvit, Uno Express SHA is minutes away from Bangkok’s business and financial districts, commercial district and transportation links. It is located within walking distance to Terminal 21 Shopping Mall and Health Land Asoke Spa & Massage.

The Asoke Skytrain and MRT stations are within walking distance, making it easy to explore the city. Hopping on the train can take you to Siam Square, where you can find street stalls and Gaysorn Plaza along the way. While a subway trip to Silom can take you to some of the hippest bars and nightclubs.

Accommodations at Uno Express SHA provides a variety of amenities that include spacious bathrooms with rain showers. It also offers high-speed wireless internet access, a 50-inch flat-screen television and a day bed.

Dine at GIGI Restaurant, which offers a breakfast. Various dining options including Italian cuisine and Japanese cuisine are available at GIGI restaurant and at the Sanriku restaurant.

name: Holiday Beach Hotel Danang / Activity Tickets
description:
Boasting a rooftop swimming pool, beach club and bar, Holiday Beach Hotel Danang offers elegantly furnished rooms that offers magnificent views of the ocean and the iconic My Khe Beach. An array of dining options are available at the 4 different restaurants, featuring delicacies ranging from international delights to traditional Vietnamese cuisine.

All rooms at the property are furnished with contemporary décor. In-room facilities include a flat-screen TV, ample seating area and work space. The en suite private bathrooms are equipped with a bath or shower and free toiletries. You will find slippers and fluffy bathrobes for your convenience.

The property features a spa and wellness center, where guests are able to enjoy rejuvenating spa treatments. Exercising can be done at the fitness center, and the property also has a business center and banquet. Bilingual staff at the 24-hour front desk are willing to assist with a variety of services, including private check-in or check-out, luggage storage and tour desk. Car rental and airport transfers can be arranged upon request at an additional charge.

Adjacent to Downtown Da Nang, the property is also a 15-minute drive away from Da Nang International Airport. The popular Hoi An Ancient Town is a 20 minute drive away, while the Da Nang Train Station is a 14-minute drive away. Free WiFi can be accessed throughout the resort and free public parking is also available on site.

Activity tickets are available with the price below.
 *Activity Tickets do not include the room access.

name: The Olive Hotel Juffair / Superior Twin
description:
Just a 5-minute drive from Al Fateh Grand Mosque, The Olive Hotel, Juffair offers free Wi-Fi in the rooms and includes a gym and spa, outdoor swimming pool and a restaurant.

All accommodations at Best Western Plus feature wooden floors. Each suite is equipped with a seating area, mini-bar and wardrobe. The private bathroom offers free toiletries.

Guests can enjoy meals at the Big Texas Barbecue & Waffle House, as well as Italian and American cuisine at The Red Plate. There is also a snack bar and 24-hour room service.

Laundry and ironing services are also available.

With Bahrain International Airport just a 20-minute drive away, The Olive Hotel, Juffair provides an airport shuttle with additional fee. The hotel also includes free valet parking.

name: Menara Peninsula Hotel / Studio Double
description:
A 15-minute drive from Mall Taman Anggrek, Menara Peninsula Hotel features an outdoor pool, 4 dining options and free WiFi access. In-room dining service is available 24 hours. Guests who drive park for free.

Menara Peninsula Hotel is a 20-minute drive from Sudirman area and a 30-minute drive from Senayan City and Plaza Senayan Shopping Mall. Soekarno-Hatta International Airport is 45 minutes’ drive away from the property. Airport transfers can be arranged at a charge.

Fitted with large windows, air-conditioned rooms are equipped with a satellite TV, mini-bar and coffee/tea-making facilities. A seating area is available in each room, while city or pool views can be enjoyed from select rooms. Private bathrooms all come with complete facilities.

Guests can work out at the gym, or pamper themselves with spa treatments. A business center and meeting facilities are also available. Operating a 24-hour front desk, the hotel offers laundry and car rental services upon request.

Serving an extensive selection of snacks and afternoon tea during the day, Rumpi Lounge offers premium cocktails and live music in the evenings. Kafe Coleman features all day dining, serving local and international dishes.

name: Angam Villas Colombo / Executive Suite
description:
5.7 miles from R Premadasa Stadium in Colombo, Angam Villas Colombo features accommodations with access to an open-air bath. This villa offers free private parking, a shared kitchen, and free Wifi. The property offers bike rental and features a garden and year-round outdoor pool.

A terrace with pool view, a satellite flat-screen TV, and air conditioning are featured in some units. At the villa complex, the units come with a private bathroom.

À la carte and continental breakfast options with local specialities and fruit are available every morning at the villa.

Sightseeing tours are available in the surrounding area. A car rental service is available at Angam Villas Colombo.

Bambalapitiya Railway Station is 6 miles from the accommodation, while Khan Clock Tower is 6.1 miles away. Diyawanna Oya Seaplane Base Airport is 1.9 miles from the property.

name: DELUXE TWIN CITY VIEW
description:
Located in Vientiane, 4.8 km from Laos National Museum, ST Hotel Wattay Airport provides accommodation with a free airport shuttle, special upgrade welcome drink, fitness centre, free private parking, a terrace, and a restaurant. This 4-star hotel offers an ATM and concierge service. The accommodation features a 24-hour front desk, room service, and free WiFi.

The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms equipped with a wardrobe, a kettle, a fridge, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV, and a private bathroom with a shower.

Wat Sisaket is 4.9 km from ST Hotel Wattay Airport, while Hor Phra Keo is 5 km away. Wattay International Airport is just 1 km from the property.

name: DELUXE KING RIVER VIEW
description:
Located in Vientiane, 4.8 km from Laos National Museum, ST Hotel Wattay Airport provides accommodation with a free airport shuttle, special upgrade welcome drink, fitness centre, free private parking, a terrace, and a restaurant. name: The Great Ponsonby Arthotel / Villa with Queen Bed
description:
The Great Ponsonby Arthotel is a charming 1890\’s heritage villa just 2 minutes stroll away from Ponsonby\’s vibrant center. It offers rooms decorated with colors of the Pacific and traditional artworks. Free WiFi, parking and daily newspapers are provided.

Ponsonby is within walking distance of several cafés, restaurants and galleries. The property is a short 5-minute drive from the harbor and central Auckland. There is a bus that passes the hotel every 10 minutes.

Our Villa Rooms are in the main house and most have french doors leading to your own private deck. These rooms are suitable for up to 2 people.

name: Puffers Inn / Deluxe King Room
description: The Deluxe King Room is fully renovated with morden bathroom, wardrobe, microwave and a bar fridge. Enjoy the luxury Sealy Commerical King Bed with pillowtop mattress.

name: Puffers Inn / Family Room
description: Our Self Contained Units feature kitchenette facilities. They are clean, comfortable and ideal for the budget conscious. Bedding is 1 double and 2 single beds.

name: Puffers Inn / Standard Room
description: These rooms are ideal for the budget conscious – They are 3 star standard and always guaranteed to be clean, comfortable and complete with great customer service. All standard rooms have tea and coffee facilities, bathroom and television.

name: Puffers Inn / Executive Queen Suite with Spa Bath
description: The discerning traveller’s choice. Our Executive spa rooms are spacious and comfortable and contain a Queen size bed and single bed. Rate is for two people sharing the same bed.

name: Phuketking Muay Thai Stay / Standard Double or Twin Room
description:
Phuket Muay Thai House is within walking distance of three Muay Thai camps, as well as shops and dining options. It offers air-conditioned rooms with patios overlooking the outdoor pool.

Bright and fitted with dark wood furnishings, the rooms have cable TV, a safety deposit box, and a refrigerator. Each room has a private bathroom with shower facilities.

Phuket Muay Thai House is a 20-minute drive from Phuket’s town center, Chalong Bay, and Phuket Zoo. Patong and Karon beaches are 30 minutes’ drive away.

The property offers car laundry services, car rental and motorbike rentals. Activities can be arranged at the tour desk.

name: Shota @Rustaveli Boutique Hotel / Standard Twin
description: Located in the heart of Tbilisi, Shota Rustaveli boutique hotel can boast a truly distinctive, unique style and concept. Modern, stylish and exquisite design gives this place a special touch of elegance and feeling of comfort and harmony. Wood-dominated interior and pastel colors creates laid-back atmosphere and makes you feel home away from home. The décor also includes some other raw natural materials like leather, iron and granite that gives an additional grace to the interior design. The hotel is just few steps away from Rustaveli Avenue, but guests can still feel very cozy and comfortable thanks to a quiet street across the avenue. Here you will find all the amenities and pleasures, that boutique hotel can offer. Gourmands will also be very happy here- the hotel’s restaurant, Melograno has one of the best cuisines in the city where you will enjoy various culinary delights. Refined style, enchanting food and highly personalized, top-quality service will make your stay here unforgettable.

name: New Palace Hotel / Standard Double Room
description:
This budget hotel in Cairo’s center has air-conditioned rooms with a balcony. It is a 5-minute walk from Ramses Train Station and a 10-minute walk from the Egyptian Museum.

The simply-furnished rooms at the New Palace Hotel have satellite TV, a safe, a minibar and a private bathroom.

The New Palace has a roof garden with a terrace where guests can enjoy drinks and refreshments. It also has a restaurant which serves a large continental breakfast.

A 24-hour front desk, free Wi-Fi and free parking are available.

The Palace is 3 minutes from the Ahmed Orabi Metro Station by foot.

name: Souphattra Hotel Vientiane / Deluxe Suite
description:
Located in Vientiane, 1.2 miles from Wat Sisaket, Souphattra Hotel Vientiane has accommodations with an outdoor swimming pool, free private parking, a fitness center and a restaurant. This 5-star hotel offers room service, a 24-hour front desk and free WiFi. The hotel provides city views and a sun terrace.

The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a desk, a coffee machine, a fridge, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a bidet. At Souphattra Hotel Vientiane rooms include bed linen and towels.

A buffet, à la carte or continental breakfast is served at the property.

Guests can use the business center or relax in the bar.

Thatluang Stupa is 1.2 miles from the accommodation, while Hor Phra Keo is 1.2 miles from the property. Wattay International Airport is 3.1 miles away.

name: The Bodhi Leaf Wellness
description:
The Bodhi Leaf Wellness Resort offers a unique series of beautifully designed rooms.
 Located in the cultural heart of Gianyar, close to Ubud and the scenic east coast of Keramas Surfing Beach, each room is inspired by a different chakra, creating an immersive and transformative experience.
 Our spaces foster grounding, stability, love, and compassion, while sparking creativity and igniting confidence.
 They support authentic expression, enhance intuition, and create a transcendent atmosphere for spiritual connection.
 Each room is equipped with thoughtful amenities, nurturing relaxation and personal growth.

name: The Pantip Hotel Ladprao Bangkok​ / Deluxe Room
description:
Pantip Hotel Ladphrao is located in the Bangkapi district in Bangkok, 3.1 mi from Central Festival EastVille. Guests can enjoy the on-site restaurant.

Every room at this hotel is air conditioned and features a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Each room is fitted with a private bathroom fitted with a shower.

There are shops at the property.

Samitivej Sukhumvit Hospital is 5 mi from Pantip Hotel Ladphrao, while Emporium Shopping Mall is 5.6 mi away. Suvarnabhumi Airport is 8.7 mi from the property.

name: Executive Suite Mekong View
description:
Located in Vientiane, 4.8 km from Laos National Museum, ST Hotel Wattay Airport provides accommodation with a free airport shuttle, special upgrade welcome drink, fitness centre, free private parking, a terrace, and a restaurant. This 4-star hotel offers an ATM and concierge service. The accommodation features a 24-hour front desk, room service, and free WiFi.

The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms equipped with a wardrobe, a kettle, a fridge, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV, and a private bathroom with a shower.

Wat Sisaket is 4.9 km from ST Hotel Wattay Airport, while Hor Phra Keo is 5 km away. Wattay International Airport is just 1 km from the property.

name: Pacific Inn / Deluxe King / Two Queen ROH
description: Welcome to The Pacific Inn. A delightful accommodation for two travelers seeking a memorable stay in Long Beach. Located near the beach, it’s perfect for exploring dining, shopping, and popular attractions like the Queen Mary. Enjoy spacious rooms with AC, private balconies, and free WiFi. Relax in the indoor pool and hot tub or on your balcony with a pool view. Start your day with the delicious breakfast takeaway service. They offer a convenient shuttle service. Friendly staff and pet-friendly. Walking distance to the pier and dining options. Comfort, convenience, and hospitality at The Pacific Inn.

name: Executive Suite City view
description:
Located in Vientiane, 3 miles from Laos National Museum, ST Hotel Wattay Airport provides accommodations with a fitness center, free private parking, a terrace and a restaurant. This 4-star hotel offers an ATM and a concierge service. The property has a 24-hour front desk, airport transportation, room service and free WiFi.

The hotel will provide guests with air-conditioned rooms with a closet, an electric tea pot, a fridge, a minibar, a safety deposit box, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with a shower.

Wat Sisaket is 3 miles from ST Hotel Wattay Airport, while Hor Phra Keo is 3.1 miles away. The nearest airport is Wattay International Airport, 0.6 miles from the accommodation.

name: Le Charme Vientiane Hotel / Deluxe Room with Queen Bed (36 sqm)
description:
Located right in the city center, Le Charme Vientiane Hotel offers free WiFi, an outdoor swimming pool and the convenience of a 24-hour front desk.

The rooms are all air-conditioned and have a satellite TV, a fridge and a mini-bar. There is also an in-room safe, a direct dial telephone and a work desk area. Iron and ironing board can be requested during their stay. All rooms have an private bathroom fitted with a hot and cold shower, towels and complimentary toiletries.

During their stay, guests can exercise in the fitness room. Alternatively, they can also enjoy the pool on the sun loungers. Other facilities include laundry services, currency exchange and luggage storage.

American breakfast is served daily at the restaurant. Cocktails can be served at the lounge. Room service is also available daily between 06:00 – 00:00 hrs.

Le Charme Vientiane Hotel Hotel is a 15-minute drive from Wattay International Airport. It is a 5-minute drive from Talat Sao Market and only 0.9 mi to the historical Haw Phra Kaew temple. Corporate offices and banks are all under 1.2 mi from the hotel.

name: Olalani Resort & Condotel / Deluxe Ocean Double
description: Discover the perfect blend of natural beauty and comfort in our Deluxe Ocean View Room at Olalani Resort & Condotel. Gaze out at the stunning ocean view framed by the gentle sway of coconut trees, creating a picturesque and calming ambiance.

name: Suwara Hotel/ Superior Room
description:
Located in Kuala Lumpur, within 3.9 miles of Federal Territory Mosque and 4.5 miles of Putra World Trade Center, Suwara Hotel Kepong KL has accommodations with a terrace and free WiFi as well as free private parking for guests who drive. The property is around 5.2 miles from Bank Negara Malaysia Museum and Art Gallery, 6 miles from Petronas Twin Towers and 6 miles from Suria KLCC. The property provides a 24-hour front desk, luggage storage space and currency exchange for guests.

All rooms come with air conditioning, a flat-screen TV with satellite channels, a fridge, a electric tea pot, a bidet, free toiletries and a closet. Rooms come complete with a private bathroom equipped with a shower and a hairdryer, while some accommodations at the hotel also feature a seating area. At Suwara Hotel Kepong KL the rooms have bed linen and towels.

Islamic Arts Museum Malaysia is 6.3 miles from the accommodation, while Perdana Botanical Gardens is 6.4 miles from the property. The nearest airport is Sultan Abdul Aziz Shah, 13 miles from Suwara Hotel Kepong KL, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

Le Charme Vientiane Hotel / Deluxe Room with Twin Beds (36 sqm)

name: Pyramids Temple Guest House / King Room with Balcony
description:
Pyramids Temple Guest House is a recently renovated guest house in Cairo near Great Sphinx. This guest house offers air-conditioned accommodations with a balcony. The guest house provides garden views, an outdoor fireplace, a 24-hour front desk, and free Wifi is available throughout the property.

The guest house provides guests with a terrace, mountain views, a seating area, a flat-screen TV, a fully equipped kitchen with an oven and a microwave, and a private bathroom with walk-in shower and bathrobes. A fridge, a stovetop, and kitchenware are also provided, as well as a coffee machine and a kettle. At the guest house, each unit is equipped with bed linen and towels.

Buffet and continental breakfast options with local specialities, fresh pastries, and fruit are available daily at Pyramids Temple Guest House. There is a coffee shop, and a mini-market is also available.

Guests at the accommodation will be able to enjoy activities in and around Cairo, like cycling and walking tours. Babysitting service is also available for guests at Pyramids Temple Guest House.

Giza Pyramids is 1.1 miles from the guest house, while Cairo Tower is 9.3 miles away. The nearest airport is Cairo International, 19 miles from Pyramids Temple Guest House, and the property offers a paid airport shuttle service.

name: Eco-friendly Why Me Tbilisi / Studio with kitchenette and private bathroom
description: Studio with kitchenette, microwave, kettle. bunk bed for parents and one child. This room has a balcony with grapes just in hand reach.

name: Eco-friendly Why Me Tbilisi / Double Room Private Bathoom
description: Double Room with private bathroom, double bed (160/200), refrigerator, reading light, closet, table and chair

name: AETAS lumpini Hotel / Deluxe Room
description: AETAS lumpini offers a prime location just a 3-minute walk from the MRT station, providing convenient access to Bangkok’s top attractions, including Terminal 21, Iconsiam, and the Temple of Dawn. The hotel features spacious rooms with modern amenities, including complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi, a free minibar, and elegant furnishings. Many rooms, such as our Junior Suite, boast stunning panoramic views of Bangkok’s skyline and Lumpini Park. Guests can start their day with a variety of delicious breakfast options and families can enjoy the dedicated Kid’s Club with engaging activities for children of all ages. The hotel also provides excellent leisure facilities, such as a pool and a fully-equipped fitness center. For business travelers, AETAS lumpini offers meeting rooms and an exclusive Executive Lounge with refreshments and evening cocktails. With concierge service and its proximity to lumpini Park, ideal for morning walks and relaxation, AETAS lumpini ensures a memorable stay for both business and leisure travelers.

name: Boutique Hotel Manufactura / Budget Double Room
description:
Attractively located in the Avlabari district of Tbilisi, Boutique Hotel Manufactura is located a 18-minute walk from Freedom Square, 1.7 miles from Rustaveli Theater and 1.8 miles from Tbilisi Opera and Ballet Theater. This 4-star hotel offers a tour desk and luggage storage space. The property has a 24-hour front desk, airport transportation, room service and free WiFi.

Complete with a private bathroom equipped with a bidet and free toiletries, the rooms at the hotel have a flat-screen TV and air conditioning, and certain rooms are equipped with a balcony. At Boutique Hotel Manufactura rooms contain bed linen and towels.

Guests at the accommodation can enjoy a continental breakfast. The restaurant at Boutique Hotel Manufactura specializes in Italian, Pizza and Russian cuisine.

Popular points of interest near the hotel include Metekhi Church, Saint George’s Armenian Cathedral and Presidential Palace. The nearest airport is Tbilisi International Airport, 7.5 miles from Boutique Hotel Manufactura.

description: Discover the perfect blend of natural beauty and comfort in our Deluxe Ocean View Room at Olalani Resort & Condotel. Gaze out at the stunning ocean view framed by the gentle sway of coconut trees, creating a picturesque and calming ambiance.

name: Holiday Beach Hotel Danang / Superior Room
description:
Boasting a rooftop swimming pool, beach club and bar, Holiday Beach Hotel Danang offers elegantly furnished rooms that offers magnificent views of the ocean and the iconic My Khe Beach. An array of dining options are available at the 4 different restaurants, featuring delicacies ranging from international delights to traditional Vietnamese cuisine.

All rooms at the property are furnished with contemporary décor. In-room facilities include a flat-screen TV, ample seating area and work space. The en suite private bathrooms are equipped with a bath or shower and free toiletries. You will find slippers and fluffy bathrobes for your convenience.

The property features a spa and wellness center, where guests are able to enjoy rejuvenating spa treatments. Exercising can be done at the fitness center, and the property also has a business center and banquet. Bilingual staff at the 24-hour front desk are willing to assist with a variety of services, including private check-in or check-out, luggage storage and tour desk. Car rental and airport transfers can be arranged upon request at an additional charge.

Adjacent to Downtown Da Nang, the property is also a 15-minute drive away from Da Nang International Airport. The popular Hoi An Ancient Town is a 20 minute drive away, while the Da Nang Train Station is a 14-minute drive away. Free WiFi can be accessed throughout the resort and free public parking is also available on site.

Activity tickets are available with the price below.
 – Pool Ticket : 9.9 USD / person
 – Pool with Hitea : 11.9 USD / person
 Additional fee above will be collected at the check in

name: Serene Beach Danang Hotel / Superior Room
description:
Located opposite of My Khe Beach in Da Nang, Serene Danang Hotel has an outdoor pool and views of the sea, and guests can enjoy a meal at the restaurant or a drink at the bar.

Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV. You will find a kettle in the room. The rooms come with a private bathroom equipped with a bath or shower. For your comfort, you will find bath robes and slippers. Serene Danang Hotel features free WiFi access throughout the property.

The hotel also offers car rental and tour services. It is 0.9 mi from Monkey Mountain. Cham Museum is 1.9 mi from Serene Danang Hotel, while Song Han Bridge / Han River Bridge is 3.1 mi away. The Dragon Bridge is about a 5-minute drive away. The nearest airport is Da Nang International Airport, 3.7 mi from the property.

name: Yarra Ocean Suites Danang / Superior Room
description:
Located in Da Nang and a minute’s walk from the beach, Yarra Ocean Suites Danang features a spa center, sauna room and hot tub. The hotel has an outdoor pool and views of the sea, and guests can enjoy a meal at the restaurant or a drink at the bar. Free WiFi is offered throughout the property.

Each room at this hotel is air conditioned and is equipped with a flat-screen TV with cable channels. Certain units have a seating area where you can relax.

Yarra Ocean Suites Danang features free WiFi throughout the property. You will find a 24-hour front desk and gift shop at the property.

Love Lock Bridge Da Nang is 1.6 mi from Yarra Ocean Suites Danang, while Cham Museum is 1.9 mi from the property. Da Nang International Airport is 3.1 mi away.

!!! [Overnight plan] inclusive Breakfast for 02 pax.

name: Pyramids Park Resort Hotel / Duplex Suite
description:
Pyramids Park Resort Cairo is set in 25 acres of gardens, just 5 minutes drive from the Pyramids. It has a 1750 square yard pool and all its rooms have balconies. The resort offers free WiFi in the rooms and all public areas.

Rooms are offering a view of the landscape gardens and Pyramids area. It includes a furnished balcony and Southern Mediterranean décor that compliments a room featuring 1 king bed and twin beds. It also features free internet access, and marble bath with soaking tub, walk-in shower and deluxe bath amenities.

Guests at Pyramids Park can dine at one of the hotel’s 4 restaurants and dine by the pool. There is also a piano bar offering live music and a discotheque.

The Pyramids Park Resort center offers information, and can arrange activities and local tours.

Rooms are offering a view of the landscape gardens, very close to the New Grand Egyptian Museum and The Pyramids area.

name: Lotus Suite Room /  Park Regis Lotus Hotel
description: Lotus Suite Room: This spacious suite spans over 55 square meters and features a comfortable living room for you to relax in. You can enjoy all the modern amenities such as Wi-Fi, tea and coffee makers, a mini bar, and a cabled TV with 43 inches in this suite. Additionally, a safety box is available in the room for your peace of mind.

name: Deluxe Twin/Double / Park Regis Lotus Hotel
description:
Our Deluxe Room Twin/ Double Rooms offers a comfortable and spacious accommodation featuring two separate single beds, making it the perfect choice for friends or colleagues traveling together. The room spans 39 square meters, providing ample space to relax and unwind.

Room Amenities:
 – Two separate single beds
 – Air conditioning
 – Flat-screen TV
 – Mini-bar
 – Coffee/tea making facilities
 – Work desk
 – Complimentary Wi-Fi
 – Ensuite bathroom with shower and bathtub
 – Hairdryer
 – In-room safe
 – Iron and ironing board

Experience a restful stay in our Deluxe Room Twin/Double, designed to cater to your comfort and convenience.

name: Deluxe Room- King Bed- Sea View / Park Regis Lotus Hotel
description: DELUXE ROOM-SEA VIEW: The sea view deluxe room, measuring 39 square meters, comes with all the amenities you need for a luxurious stay. Enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, a tea and coffee maker, mini bar, cabled TV with a 43-inch screen, a safety box, and 24-hour room service. Take in the breathtaking view of the sea from your room and experience ultimate relaxation.

name: Deluxe Room- King Bed- City View / Park Regis Lotus Hotel
description: The deluxe room with city view measures 39 square meters and comes fully equipped with all the amenities you need for a comfortable stay. Enjoy complimentary Wi-Fi, a tea and coffee maker, mini bar, cabled TV with a 43-inch screen, a safety box, and 24-hour room service.
